title: Version 5.4 — Prompt Constitution
summary: **Patch ladder:** Codenames `Void` → `Bloom` per minor (`.0`–`.9`) — see patch table below.
flowcharts:
flowchart TD
    stageNode["5.4.0 Prompt Constitution — versioned prompts + audit"]
    contract["Contract"]
    service["Service"]
    surface["Surface"]
    data["Data"]
    ops["Ops"]
    releaseGate["Release gate"]

    stageNode --> contract
    stageNode --> service
    stageNode --> surface
    stageNode --> data
    stageNode --> ops
    contract --> releaseGate
    service --> releaseGate
    surface --> releaseGate
    data --> releaseGate
    ops --> releaseGate

flowchart LR
    change["Prompt change PR"]
    promote["Promote PROMPT_VERSION"]
    chat["New chats pick up vN"]
    audit["logs + ai_chats metadata"]

    change --> promote
    promote --> chat
    chat --> audit
micro_gate: **Patch intent bands:** `.0` charter, `.1-.2` scaffold, `.3-.5` hardening, `.6-.8` integration, `.9` freeze/handoff.
